messages.content: Describe a time you improved a process metric.
Our pick path was too long. I reviewed zone-level data, moved high-volume SKUs closer to packing, trained shift leads on the new layout, and pick time dropped by about 12 percent.
How do you handle a safety or quality tradeoff when shipments are late?
I would not skip a required safety or quality check. I would split the backlog, escalate the service-level risk, and add labor to the constrained step if available.

human_notes: Validates process improvement and safety judgment; people-management depth remains light.
